languages.text: В системе Слеза Солара Лорд-капитан обнаружил{mf||а} древний шаттл с инсигнией Инквизиции и пилотом 32-го меровского штрафного легиона. На сохранившейся вокс-записи сказано, что их покровитель погиб, а полк остался на мире GH-89-717.

In the star system known as the Tear of Solar, the Lord Captain discovered an ancient shuttle bearing the insignia of the Inquisition and a pilot from the 32nd Merov Penal Regiment. The surviving vox-recording revealed that the regiment's patron died, leaving the unit on world GH-89-717.
languages.original_text: В системе Слеза Солара Лорд-капитан обнаружил{mf||а} древний шаттл с инсигнией Инквизиции и пилотом 32-го меровского штрафного легиона. На сохранившейся вокс-записи сказано, что их покровитель погиб, а полк остался на мире GH-89-717.

traits.locale_text: In the star system known as the Tear of Solar, the Lord Captain discovered an ancient shuttle bearing the insignia of the Inquisition and a pilot from the 32nd Merov Penal Regiment. The surviving vox-recording revealed that the regiment's patron died, leaving the unit on world GH-89-717.

On one of the worlds in the Zarkov System, the Lord Captain discovered an ancient shuttle bearing Inquisition insignia and a pilot from the 32nd Merov Penal Regiment. The surviving vox-recording revealed that the regiment's patron died, leaving the unit on world GH-89-717.

On one of the worlds in the Zarkov System, the Lord Captain discovered an ancient shuttle bearing Inquisition insignia and a pilot from the 32nd Merov Penal Regiment. The surviving vox-recording revealed that the regiment's patron died, leaving the unit on world GH-89-717.

In the star system known as the Tear of Solar, the Lord Captain discovered an ancient shuttle bearing the insignia of the Inquisition and a pilot from the 32nd Merov Penal Regiment. The surviving vox-recording revealed that the regiment's patron died, leaving the unit on world GH-89-717.

languages.text: ザルコフ星系のある惑星で、ロード・キャプテンはインキジションの紋章が刻まれた古びたシャトルと、32番メローフ連隊のパイロットを発見した。生き残ったボイス・レコーダーから、連隊の庇護者が亡くなり、部隊はGH-89-717の惑星に放置されたことが判明した。
languages.original_text: On one of the worlds in the Zarkov System, the Lord Captain discovered an ancient shuttle bearing Inquisition insignia and a pilot from the 32nd Merov Penal Regiment. The surviving vox-recording revealed that the regiment's patron died, leaving the unit on world GH-89-717.

traits.locale_text: ザルコフ星系のある惑星で、ロード・キャプテンはインキジションの紋章が刻まれた古びたシャトルと、32番メローフ連隊のパイロットを発見した。生き残ったボイス・レコーダーから、連隊の庇護者が亡くなり、部隊はGH-89-717の惑星に放置されたことが判明した。

languages.text: En el sistema estelar conocido como Lágrima de Solar, {mf|el|la} Lord Capitán descubrió una antigua lanzadera con una insignia de la Inquisición y un piloto del 32.º regimiento penal de Merov. La grabación de voco encontrada reveló que el mecenas del patrón había muerto, dejando a la unidad en el planeta GH-89-717.
languages.original_text: In the star system known as the Tear of Solar, the Lord Captain discovered an ancient shuttle bearing the insignia of the Inquisition and a pilot from the 32nd Merov Penal Regiment. The surviving vox-recording revealed that the regiment's patron died, leaving the unit on world GH-89-717.

traits.locale_text: En el sistema estelar conocido como Lágrima de Solar, {mf|el|la} Lord Capitán descubrió una antigua lanzadera con una insignia de la Inquisición y un piloto del 32.º regimiento penal de Merov. La grabación de voco encontrada reveló que el mecenas del patrón había muerto, dejando a la unidad en el planeta GH-89-717.

languages.text: In einem Sternsystem namens Träne von Solar entdeckte der Lord Captain ein altes Shuttle mit den Insignien der Inquisition und einem Piloten des 32. merovianischen Strafregiments. Die erhaltene Vox-Aufzeichnung offenbarte, dass der Patron des Regiments gestorben war und die Einheit auf Welt GH-89-717 zurückgelassen hatte.
languages.original_text: In the star system known as the Tear of Solar, the Lord Captain discovered an ancient shuttle bearing the insignia of the Inquisition and a pilot from the 32nd Merov Penal Regiment. The surviving vox-recording revealed that the regiment's patron died, leaving the unit on world GH-89-717.

traits.locale_text: In einem Sternsystem namens Träne von Solar entdeckte der Lord Captain ein altes Shuttle mit den Insignien der Inquisition und einem Piloten des 32. merovianischen Strafregiments. Die erhaltene Vox-Aufzeichnung offenbarte, dass der Patron des Regiments gestorben war und die Einheit auf Welt GH-89-717 zurückgelassen hatte.

languages.text: Dans le système stellaire de la Larme de Solar, {mf|le seigneur-capitaine|la seigneure-capitaine} a découvert un emblème de l'Inquisition, ainsi qu'un pilote de la 32e Légion Pénale de Merov. L'enregistrement-vox trouvé sur place indiquait qu'après le décès de son protecteur, l'unité s'était retrouvée piégée sur la planète GH-89-717.
languages.original_text: In the star system known as the Tear of Solar, the Lord Captain discovered an ancient shuttle bearing the insignia of the Inquisition and a pilot from the 32nd Merov Penal Regiment. The surviving vox-recording revealed that the regiment's patron died, leaving the unit on world GH-89-717.

traits.locale_text: Dans le système stellaire de la Larme de Solar, {mf|le seigneur-capitaine|la seigneure-capitaine} a découvert un emblème de l'Inquisition, ainsi qu'un pilote de la 32e Légion Pénale de Merov. L'enregistrement-vox trouvé sur place indiquait qu'après le décès de son protecteur, l'unité s'était retrouvée piégée sur la planète GH-89-717.

languages.text: 在名为“太阳之泪”的星系中，舰长大人发现了一艘古旧的穿梭机，其上带有审判庭的徽章，以及一位来自梅罗夫第32判罪军团的飞行员。残存的音阵记录显示，该军团的庇护人已然身亡，全团被遗弃于GH-89-717世界。
languages.original_text: In the star system known as the Tear of Solar, the Lord Captain discovered an ancient shuttle bearing the insignia of the Inquisition and a pilot from the 32nd Merov Penal Regiment. The surviving vox-recording revealed that the regiment's patron died, leaving the unit on world GH-89-717.

traits.locale_text: 在名为“太阳之泪”的星系中，舰长大人发现了一艘古旧的穿梭机，其上带有审判庭的徽章，以及一位来自梅罗夫第32判罪军团的飞行员。残存的音阵记录显示，该军团的庇护人已然身亡，全团被遗弃于GH-89-717世界。

languages.text: Solar Gözyaşı olarak bilinen yıldız sisteminde Lord Kaptan, Engizisyon nişanını taşıyan kadim bir mekik ve 32. Merov Ceza İnfaz Alayı'na mensup bir pilot keşfetti. Kurtarılan voks kaydı, alayın hamisinin öldüğünü ve birliği GH-89-717 dünyasında bıraktığını ortaya çıkardı.
languages.original_text: In the star system known as the Tear of Solar, the Lord Captain discovered an ancient shuttle bearing the insignia of the Inquisition and a pilot from the 32nd Merov Penal Regiment. The surviving vox-recording revealed that the regiment's patron died, leaving the unit on world GH-89-717.

traits.locale_text: Solar Gözyaşı olarak bilinen yıldız sisteminde Lord Kaptan, Engizisyon nişanını taşıyan kadim bir mekik ve 32. Merov Ceza İnfaz Alayı'na mensup bir pilot keşfetti. Kurtarılan voks kaydı, alayın hamisinin öldüğünü ve birliği GH-89-717 dünyasında bıraktığını ortaya çıkardı.
